title: Amazon 副图场景生活方式
prompt_template: An Amazon secondary lifestyle image for {product_name}, 1024x1024. Scene: a {target_persona} using the product in a {setting_description} environment, authentic candid moment, natural daylight from window, shallow depth of field with focus on the product. Soft color grade matching the product's brand palette ({brand_color_hex}). Subtle brand logo in bottom-right corner at 5% size. Noe: leave 200px clear space at top for Amazon UI overlay. Style: premium lifestyle product photography, aspirational but believable, 1024x1024.
